message:
feat: add scenario_breakdown schema validation, policy snapshot tests, S3FIFO fallback latch tests, and provider/CLI normalization proptests

ext_workloads: Extend hotspot matrix schema validation to require a
scenario_breakdown array with per-row type checks on scenario, extension,
samples, per_call_us, total_us, and a weights sub-object covering marshal,
queue, schedule, policy, execute, and io — each validated as finite f64.

extension_dispatcher: Two new policy snapshot tests:
- policy_snapshot_version_changes_on_material_policy_delta verifies that
  mutating deny_caps produces a distinct snapshot version.
- policy_snapshot_lookup_swaps_decision_across_profile_change confirms that
  Safe→Deny and Permissive→Allow decisions hold for case-insensitive cap
  lookups.

hostcall_s3_fifo: Two new fallback behavior tests:
- fallback_latches_until_clear_and_reason_stays_stable asserts that once
  low-signal fallback activates, all subsequent decisions bypass with the
  same SignalQualityInsufficient reason until explicit clear_fallback().
- fairness_fallback_reports_same_reason_during_repeated_bypass confirms
  FairnessInstability reason persists during budget-rejection triggered
  fallback.

providers/mod.rs: Property tests (proptest) proving idempotence and correct
suffix targeting for normalize_openai_base (/chat/completions),
normalize_openai_responses_base (/responses), and normalize_cohere_base
(/chat). Additional cross-suffix rewriting proptests confirm /responses→
/chat/completions and vice versa under variable trailing slashes.

app.rs: normalize_cli_is_idempotent proptest proving that repeated
normalize_cli calls produce stable provider, no_session, and print values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
